resolved.description: XML contract eval: agent authors public-safe Maestro BPMN wrappers for documented Orchestrator, A2A, queue, business-rule, call-activity, message-event, case-management, wait-event, migration, and preserve-only extension variants.
resolved.initial_prompt:
Create a local BPMN project named "ContractVariantsBpmn".
Use synthetic placeholder resource names only. Do not include tenant URLs,
folder keys, connection IDs, queue IDs, release keys, real process names, or
real user names.

The BPMN must include a public-safe process that manually starts, visits each
wrapper below, and ends:
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Orchestrator.StartAgentJob`.
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `A2A.AgentExecution`.
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Orchestrator.ExecuteApiWorkflowAsync`.
- `bpmn:businessRuleTask` with `Orchestrator.BusinessRules`.
- `bpmn:sendTask` with `Orchestrator.CreateQueueItem`.
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Orchestrator.CreateAndWaitForQueueItem`.
- `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartAgenticProcess`.
- `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartAgenticProcessAsync`.
- `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcess`; if a
  case-management payload is needed, mark it preserve-only and synthetic.
- `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcessAsync`; keep it
  synthetic and do not invent deployment identifiers.
- `bpmn:receiveTask` with `Intsvc.WaitForEvent`; keep connector details
  placeholder-safe and do not hand-author private connection metadata.
- `bpmn:intermediateThrowEvent` with `Maestro.SendMessageEvent`; keep the
  message name and payload synthetic.
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Maestro.CasePlanScheduler`; mark it draft-only or
  preserve-only and keep all payloads synthetic.
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails`; mark it
  preserve-only and keep all payloads synthetic.
- `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator`; mark it preserve-only
  and keep all payloads synthetic.
- Preserve numeric `uipath:migrationVersion` values `5`, `11`, and `11.5`.
- Preserve a legacy `uipath:scriptVersion` value `v2` on a script task while
  still following the skill guidance that new scripts should prefer `v3`.
- Preserve a generic unsupported `uipath:Activity` payload instead of
  rewriting or deleting it.

Include BPMN DI for every visible node and sequence flow. Do not upload,
publish, deploy, debug, or run the process.

agent.system_prompt: You are a coding agent. Do not access files in sibling runs/* directories. Everywhere else is permitted.

success_criteria.description: Contract variant wrappers use the documented BPMN element types

task_config.source_yaml:
task_id: skill-bpmn-contract-variant-wrappers
description: >
  XML contract eval: agent authors public-safe Maestro BPMN wrappers for
  documented Orchestrator, A2A, queue, business-rule, call-activity,
  message-event, case-management, wait-event, migration, and preserve-only
  extension variants.
tags: [uipath-maestro-bpmn, integration, lifecycle:generate, contract:xml, node:service-task, node:call-activity, connector]

run_limits:
  expected_turns: 20
  max_turns: 90
  turn_timeout: 1200
initial_prompt: |
  Create a local BPMN project named "ContractVariantsBpmn".
  Use synthetic placeholder resource names only. Do not include tenant URLs,
  folder keys, connection IDs, queue IDs, release keys, real process names, or
  real user names.

  The BPMN must include a public-safe process that manually starts, visits each
  wrapper below, and ends:
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Orchestrator.StartAgentJob`.
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `A2A.AgentExecution`.
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Orchestrator.ExecuteApiWorkflowAsync`.
  - `bpmn:businessRuleTask` with `Orchestrator.BusinessRules`.
  - `bpmn:sendTask` with `Orchestrator.CreateQueueItem`.
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Orchestrator.CreateAndWaitForQueueItem`.
  - `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartAgenticProcess`.
  - `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartAgenticProcessAsync`.
  - `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcess`; if a
    case-management payload is needed, mark it preserve-only and synthetic.
  - `bpmn:callActivity` with `Orchestrator.StartCaseMgmtProcessAsync`; keep it
    synthetic and do not invent deployment identifiers.
  - `bpmn:receiveTask` with `Intsvc.WaitForEvent`; keep connector details
    placeholder-safe and do not hand-author private connection metadata.
  - `bpmn:intermediateThrowEvent` with `Maestro.SendMessageEvent`; keep the
    message name and payload synthetic.
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Maestro.CasePlanScheduler`; mark it draft-only or
    preserve-only and keep all payloads synthetic.
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Maestro.CaseManagerGuardrails`; mark it
    preserve-only and keep all payloads synthetic.
  - `bpmn:serviceTask` with `Maestro.CaseRulesEvaluator`; mark it preserve-only
    and keep all payloads synthetic.
  - Preserve numeric `uipath:migrationVersion` values `5`, `11`, and `11.5`.
  - Preserve a legacy `uipath:scriptVersion` value `v2` on a script task while
    still following the skill guidance that new scripts should prefer `v3`.
  - Preserve a generic unsupported `uipath:Activity` payload instead of
    rewriting or deleting it.

  Include BPMN DI for every visible node and sequence flow. Do not upload,
  publish, deploy, debug, or run the process.

success_criteria:
  - type: file_exists
    description: "BPMN source was created"
    path: "ContractVariantsBpmn/ContractVariantsBpmn.bpmn"
    weight: 1.0
    pass_threshold: 1.0

  - type: run_command
    description: "Contract variant wrappers use the documented BPMN element types"
    command: "python3 $TASK_DIR/check_contract_variant_wrappers.py"
    timeout: 30
    expected_exit_code: 0
    weight: 5.0
    pass_threshold: 1.0
